prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SPACEBATTLEDINOGUN-RED Product Type: TOY_GUN Brand (from catalog): Kidplay Products Existing Title: KidPlay Morphing Space Blaster Light up Toy Gun, Battle Bot Dino Toy Dinosaur Description: Fight in the ultimate battle with the Dino Gun Space Battle Bot Light-up T-Rex Blaster Toy.

PEW PEW PEW - THE MONSTER DINO BOT FROM THE FUTURE INTERGALACTIC WORM HOLE IS ABOUT TO CAUSE A RUCKUS OF ENTERTAINMENT. PEW PEW PEW

The T-Rex 3-in-1 space blaster is perfect to head into pretend intergalactic battle as it dino gun transforms from an ordinary blaster to a ferocious dino gun by unscrewing the muzzle with the included drill. Designed to spark the active imagination and creative play while role playing. Providing hours of fun, just watch the T-Rex's jaw unhinge and light up along with the side panels as it charges up for epic battle. It even roars. So get ready for battle action day. Your little space ranger's mind will expand with the endless role playing possibilities as they build their own TREX dinosaur toy gun. With it's lively sound and light effects, it's the perfect addition to space and dinosaur themed costumes on Halloween, at costume parties, birthdays or just for pretend play. Made from durable plastic construction yet lightweight as to not weigh down. Tyrannosaurus rex for kids toy gun measures over 15 inches in it's dino gun form. Three AA batteries needed, not included. Toy gun is packaged in a beautiful space battle dino blaster gift box.

This is a great toy for young kids and dinosaur fans. Boys will love using their imagination while learning how to build independently. Search Terms: toy gun; robot toy gun; fun christmas toy; dinosaur toys dino bots dino gun toy pretend play dinos light up toys Features: - 3-IN-1 BATTLE MODE DINOSAUR GUN MORPHER: Unleash the power of the T-Rex gun toy with this 3-in-1 transformer blaster! It's perfect to head to pretend play game battle as it transforms from an ordinary blaster to a space battle super charger dino gun by unscrewing the muzzle - TRANSFORMS WITH INTERCHANGABLE PARTS: Transforms into 3 Different Shapes. Great cool dinosaur gift for age 3 years old kids, boys and girls. With the simple press of the trigger, charge and watch the T-Rex's jaw unhinge and light up along with the side panels as it charges up for epic battle. It even roars - HIGH QUALITY 3 IN 1 DINO GUN SPACE BLASTER: Toy gun is lightweight and highly durable.. Made from high quality ABS plastic; lightweight as to not weigh down as your little one heads into epic missions and battles. It can make and withstand hours of indoor and outdo - Ages 3 and up; Requires (3) AA Batteries (Not Included) - OVERALL SIZE: 16 inches; larger than life with real working lights and sounds === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
